src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for retrieving the first element.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to align with Java 21 API conventions.
Replace legacy List.add(int index, E element) with the new List.addFirst(E element) method introduced in Java 21.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.why_exists: The method addFirst is not available in Java 17; this change is a modernization using the new API, not a fix for a compilation error in the old code.
